title: Yaphiya` #3309
definition:
Japhia = "shining"

 n pr loc
 1) a town on the border of Zebulun and Issachar
    1a) perhaps modern 'Yafa'

 n pr m
 2) the king of Lachish at the time of the conquest of Canaan by Joshua
 3) a son of David by a concubine
nasbUsage:
Definition: Japhia = "shining"

 n pr loc
 1) a town on the border of Zebulun and Issachar
    1a) perhaps modern 'Yafa'

 n pr m
 2) the king of Lachish at the time of the conquest of Canaan by Joshua

    NASB:  a king of Lachish, also a son of David, also a place on the border of Zebulun
